name: io.github.OWNER/sled-feed-mississippi
description: Mississippi government procurement feed with CHANGE TRACKING — deadline extensions, new awards, and added addenda that the free state portal does not surface.
_publish_note: Set OWNER to the GitHub account before submitting. The official MCP registry requires the server reachable via a package (PyPI/npm/OCI) or remote; this stdio server is Python — package via PyPI or ship the repo to auto-crawling directories (Glama/PulseMCP) and Smithery. See PUBLISH.md.

packages._note: PyPI package not yet published; placeholder so the manifest validates. Alternatively use a git/OCI package entry.
